aboutMeText1: I'm Sebastian Ruiz — a Senior Frontend Developer with 5+ years of experience building scalable, high-performance web applications for enterprise clients.
aboutMeText2: Currently at Globant, I'm part of the frontend team building choicehotels.com — working on the booking flow, optimizing Core Web Vitals, and delivering features that serve millions of monthly users using React, TypeScript, and GraphQL.
aboutMeText3: Beyond my day job, I build products. Brew Notes is my local-first knowledge management app with AI, and I've shipped open-source tools like an Evernote MCP Server for LLM integrations. I'm driven by the intersection of great UI and smart architecture.
aboutMeText4: I care deeply about accessibility (WCAG), performance optimization, and developer experience. I've worked on JS-to-TypeScript migrations, mentored junior developers, and built A/B testing integrations at scale.
aboutMeText5: Earlier in my career I explored design, blockchain development, and co-founded Web3ForU — a non-profit to onboard developers into Web3. I believe the best engineers never stop learning.
